name: Cheesy Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1 large bunch spinach or other leafy greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the spinach leaves well and remove stems. Chop the leaves and stems separately.
2. In a wok or skillet, sauté the stems, onions, and garlic until the onions are translucent.
3. Stir in the cooked rice.
4. Lay the spinach leaves on top of the rice mixture.
5. Cover the pan and cook until the spinach is wilted.
6. Stir the leaves into the rice mixture.
7. Add the cheese and season to taste with soy sauce.
8. Stir until the cheese melts and holds the mixture together.
